name: second
description: The base unit of time in the International System of Units (SI).

name: minute
description: A unit of time equal to 60 seconds.

name: hour
description: A unit of time equal to 60 minutes or 3,600 seconds.

name: day
description: A unit of time equal to 24 hours, representing one full rotation of the Earth.

name: week
description: A unit of time equal to 7 days.

name: month
description: A calendar-based unit of time, typically ranging from 28 to 31 days.

name: quarter
description: A period of three months, often used in business and financial reporting.

name: year
description: A unit of time equal to approximately 365.25 days, representing one orbit of the Earth around the Sun.
